Anna checks in on you, says she wants to help after everything you have done, and talks about yokai third eyes.
Anji explains why the tanuki hide in Seikyu and talks with you about loneliness, history, and whether you can become friends.

Hephaestus arrives after a nightmare to make sure you and Kon are safe.
Hephaestus has something to show you. Come to the forge for a surprise.
A gulubo ronin warns that the Muramasa blade's curse is harming Hephaestus and helps keep him stable for now.
Hephaestus shows you a scenic spot and celebrates becoming a master smith with fireworks.

events.What Happens: Yohji is troubled by his sister, Liliana, who hasn't returned from her morning walk. He fears she may have hurt herself while exploring the area and needs your help to find her.
You've been invited to Liliana's home tomorrow night to watch her special flowers bloom. Be there to experience it together.
Liliana rushes to show you her finished Ephemera painting and wants you to see it right away.
Liliana has invited you to see her Ephemera and Peacock Cactus paintings. Head over to the Inari Temple for the exhibition.
Yoni is worried about Liliana's recent obsession with her garden and has asked you to spend some time with Liliana. Go to Yoni's garden when you’re free.
Liliana has planned to show Priest Leon her latest piece of art, but she is very nervous. Go to the temple to accompany her and be her cheerleaders.

events.What Happens: Torleone is worried about Seabert who seems to be struggling, but will not talk to Torleone because he does not want him to be worried. See if you’re able to get Seabert to open up to you.
Yui has asked you to bring the photo Seabert took of you and Kon to the tavern, as it will be a part of a little exhibition to celebrate Seabert's talent! Head over to the tavern now!

events.What Happens: Shuten invites you to the tavern to plan out the Recipe Heist that was discussed at the welcome bonfire.
Shuten asks you to cover her at the tavern while she takes the boys out for the afternoon.
It's heist time! Time to put the plan in action and steal that recipe.
Ritsuryo and Kinn think Shuten is keeping a secret from them about the heist, and want you to come and confront her.
Shuten has invited you and Kon over for late-night drinks at the tavern. Head over there when you’re free.
Shuten has invited you and Kon over for a special family dinner!

Torleone told you that he is going to pop the question to Miss Ama and he wants you there! Meet him at Pearl Lake at 3 pm.
Miss Ama and Torleone return from wedding planning, thank you for helping their relationship, and talk about staying close.
